name: aws-solutions-constructs-aws-wafwebacl-alb

metadata.name: aws-solutions-constructs.aws-wafwebacl-alb
metadata.summary: CDK constructs for defining an AWS web WAF connected to an Application Load Balancer.

modules.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb

methods.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb.WafwebaclToAlb.__init__
documentation:
---
access: public
param existing_load_balancer_obj: The existing Application Load Balancer instance
  that will be protected with the WAF web ACL.
param existing_webacl_obj: Existing instance of a WAF web ACL, an error will occur
  if this and props is set.
param id: '- this is a a scope-unique id.'
param scope: '- represents the scope for all the resources.'
param webacl_props: 'Optional user-provided props to override the default props for
  the AWS WAF web ACL. Default: - Default properties are used.'
summary: Constructs a new instance of the WafwebaclToAlb class.
---

methods.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb.WafwebaclToAlbProps.__init__
documentation:
---
param existing_load_balancer_obj: The existing Application Load Balancer instance
  that will be protected with the WAF web ACL.
param existing_webacl_obj: Existing instance of a WAF web ACL, an error will occur
  if this and props is set.
param webacl_props: 'Optional user-provided props to override the default props for
  the AWS WAF web ACL. Default: - Default properties are used.'
summary: The properties for the WafwebaclToAlb class.
---

methods.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb.WafwebaclToAlbProps.existing_load_balancer_obj
documentation: The existing Application Load Balancer instance that will be protected with the WAF web ACL.

methods.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb.WafwebaclToAlbProps.existing_webacl_obj
documentation: Existing instance of a WAF web ACL, an error will occur if this and props is set.

methods.name: aws_solutions_constructs.aws_wafwebacl_alb.WafwebaclToAlbProps.webacl_props
documentation:
Optional user-provided props to override the default props for the AWS WAF web ACL.

:default: - Default properties are used.
